Add Langfuse tracing to Athena pipeline
description: Instrument the Deep Agents pipeline with Langfuse callback handler. LangChain has native support — needs langfuse pip dependency, 3 env vars (LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY, LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY, LANGFUSE_HOST), and callback passed via astream() config. Should trace ops_manager + subagent delegation + reviewer. Feature-flagged via env var so tracing is optional.

Wire AAP2 project to Gitea instead of GitHub for playbooks
description:
The aap2_tenant_config role currently points the AAP2 Project SCM at https://github.com/rhpds/agentic-aiops-plays.git. This creates an external dependency on GitHub from the lab cluster.

The tenant already has a Gitea instance with the plays repo cloned (ocp4_workload_tenant_gitea_user_repositories). Switch the AAP2 project SCM URL to point at the tenant's Gitea repo instead.

This means:
1. The gitea_user role already clones agentic-aiops-plays into Gitea (confirmed in AgnosticV catalog)
2. Update ocp4_workload_aap2_tenant_config to use the Gitea URL pattern: https://gitea.<domain>/<username>/AI-DevOps.git
3. The Gitea URL needs to be discovered or constructed from known variables
4. Removes runtime dependency on GitHub — all content is local to the cluster

Add tmux to ttyd container via multi-stage build
description: tmux is not in UBI9 repos. Compile from source in a multi-stage Dockerfile build (needs gcc, make, libevent-devel, ncurses-devel). Runtime deps are already on UBI9. Use tmux 3.5a from GitHub releases.
close_reason: tmux 3.3a compiled from source in UBI9 multi-stage build, tmux.conf with vi mode and mouse support

title: Mount ttyd bashrc from ConfigMap
description: Replace the baked-in .bashrc in the ttyd Dockerfile with a ConfigMap mount. Include the prompt, greeting, and any env setup. Mountable via subPath at /root/.bashrc. Allows per-tenant customization via AgnosticV overrides.

title: Showroom bonus module: Langfuse observability
description: Write a bonus showroom module where students explore Langfuse traces from their pipeline runs. Show how to read the trace timeline, identify which subagent ran, see token usage per call, and compare model performance. Reference pattern: https://tonykay.github.io/showroom-deep-agents/modules/13-bonus-langfuse.html

title: Display Langfuse trace summary in Kira ticket view
description: Show a simplified trace view in Kira's ticket detail — timeline of ops_manager -> classification -> subagent delegation -> review -> ticket creation. Could be as simple as a list of steps with timing. Langfuse trace ID would be stored on the ticket. Full trace available via link to Langfuse UI.

title: Add retry logic to AAP2 client HTTP calls
description: Athena's AAP2 adapter (athena/adapters/aap2.py) makes httpx calls to the controller API without retry logic. When AAP2 drops the connection mid-request (RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected without sending a response), the pipeline fails with a traceback instead of retrying.\n\nAdd tenacity or manual retry with backoff to get_job(), get_job_stdout(), get_job_events(), and register_webhook() methods. Transient HTTP errors (502, 503, connection reset) should retry 3 times with exponential backoff.

value: deepagents pip package is 'deepagents' (library only, no CLI entry point). The CLI is a separate package called 'deepagents-cli', install with 'uv tool install deepagents-cli'. The CLI command is just 'deepagents'.

FastAPI route ordering: static routes (e.g. /general/send) must be defined BEFORE parameterized routes (e.g. /{ticket_id}/send) in the same router. Otherwise FastAPI tries to parse 'general' as a UUID and returns 422.

Showroom AsciiDoc conventions: use role="execute" on source blocks for copy button; link=self (without window=blank) for lightbox popout on images/SVGs; numbered steps with _Sample output:_ blocks after every command; use {user}/{password} not {guid} for credentials (showroom injects these); use {gitea_url} for Gitea links; inline login hint pattern: 'In the **Tab** tab (log in with `{user}` / `{password}` if prompted)'
AAP2 resource naming convention: use postfix guid (e.g. admin-backdoor-key-{{ guid }}) not prefix. Keeps descriptive name scannable in the AAP2 UI.

Athena ops_manager model is now configurable via OPS_MANAGER_MODEL env var (defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6). Students can switch it with: oc set env deployment/athena OPS_MANAGER_MODEL=qwen3-235b. Wired through Helm values agentConfig.opsManagerModel.

Pre-Langfuse baseline tags across all repos: athena-aiops-deep-agent v0.8.0-pre-langfuse, kira v0.9.0-pre-langfuse, showroom v0.8.0-pre-langfuse, deepagents-aiops v0.9.0-pre-langfuse. Use these to revert if Langfuse integration causes issues.

Pre-render Mermaid diagrams as SVGs for showroom content — inline mermaid renders too small in the split panel. Use npx @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli to render, then reference with image::diagram.svg[alt,link=self,width=700] for lightbox popout.

tmux not in UBI9 repos (not base, not EPEL, not CRB). bison/yacc also not available. Solution: multi-stage build from UBI9 (not Fedora — glibc mismatch). tmux 3.3a builds without yacc (includes pre-generated parser). tmux 3.5a requires yacc. Runtime deps libevent and ncurses are in UBI9 base.

Alembic migration chain: always check the FULL chain with 'grep down_revision versions/*.py' before writing a new migration. Each migration must point to the actual tail of the chain, not just the latest file by date. Multiple heads = broken migration on deploy.

LLMs don't reliably include optional fields in JSON output. For agent metadata (agent_name, model_name), use a layered approach: 1) Skill says REQUIRED with strong language, 2) Programmatic fallback infers agent from area field, 3) Model looked up from subagents.yaml by agent name. Never rely solely on the LLM reporting its own identity.

Never put a trailing period after credential examples in showroom content — students will copy-paste it by mistake. Write: log in with user / password (no period, no punctuation after the last credential value).

When pushing updated images with the same tag (e.g. kira-api:0.8.0), nodes cache the old image if imagePullPolicy is IfNotPresent. Bump the patch version (0.8.0 -> 0.8.1) to force a pull. Athena uses imagePullPolicy: Always so latest tag works, but Kira chart uses IfNotPresent.

AAP2 credentials and execution environments are controller-scoped (not org-scoped). Always append guid to their names for multi-tenant uniqueness. Job templates, notification templates, inventories, and projects are org-scoped and safe without guid.
Prefer HTTPS git remote URLs over SSH (git@) — easier to copy/paste into browsers and share. e.g. https://github.com/rhpds/repo.git not git@github.com:rhpds/repo.git

PVC skills are copied from image on first boot only. If you update a skill in the image, existing tenants keep the old version on their PVC. New tenants get the updated skill. To update an existing tenant's skill, oc exec or oc cp onto the PVC and restart.

Showroom attribute substitution: blank line after ==== admonition delimiter breaks attribute processing ({user} renders as literal text). No blank line between ==== and content. Also avoid trailing periods after credential examples — students copy-paste them.

ttyd container runs as dev user (uid 1001). Python venv at /opt/deepagents with uv-managed Python 3.13 at /root/.local/share/uv/python/. Both /root (chmod a+x) and the uv python dir (chmod a+rX) must be world-traversable for the dev user. deepagents-cli installed via uv tool as dev user, lives at /home/dev/.local/bin/deepagents.

Kira image versions: API at 0.9.1 (general chat endpoint + agent metadata + route fix), frontend at 0.9.0 (workspace chatbot + readability fixes + recommended action formatting), ttyd at 0.9.2 (dev user, tmux 3.3a, neovim 0.12, Python 3.13, deepagents-cli, bat, yq, tmux.conf). Kira source repo is tonykay/kira, images at quay.io/rhpds/kira-api, kira-frontend, kira-ttyd. Dockerfiles are in deploy/ not repo root.

Showroom v0.7.0 module structure for lb2645-agentic-devops: M1 Problem Domain (AAP2/Kira/RC tour), M2 Your First Failure (launch job + pipeline breakdown), M3 Agentic DevOps Team (build sre_ssh agent via ConfigMap+PVC), M4 Open Source Models (swap to qwen3-235b), M5 Full OSS Control + HITL autonomy spectrum. Pre-built configs in agentic-aiops-plays/configs/ for safe wget+patch pattern.
